item.title: Conjugate Gradient Method
item.author: Qirui (Chiray) Fu
item.description: Conjugate Gradient Method in Solving Linear Equation System Linear Equation System In fluid simulation, sometimes we need to solve a Linear Equation System like doing projection in Eulerian fluid. A linear Equation System can be written as a matrix form: $$ Ax = b $$ where $A$ is a $N\times N$ matrix and $x,b$ are $N\times 1$ vectors. Actually, we have a lot of methods to solve this problem, like Gauss-Seidel iteration, Gaussian elimination, etc.
